title: Mildly Garlicky Glassy-Jelly Spanish Catalan Vegetable Oil Flatbread
description: A sick-day Spanish Catalan dish featuring a glassy-jelly lacquer-glaze made with vegetable oil and suitable for an ayurvedic-sattvic diet.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use a high-protein flour for better texture

instructions: Combine warm water, all-purpose flour, and salt in a mixing bowl. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.

Preheat a salt-block in a preheated oven at 425	7F (220
C) for 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough into a thin circle, about 1/4 inch thick.
Brush the dough with vegetable oil and place it on the preheated salt-block.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the flatbread is golden brown and crispy.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for 2-3 minutes.
Mix garlic, coconut sugar, and rosemary in a small bowl. Brush the garlic mixture onto the flatbread.
Place the flatbread under the broiler for 1-2 minutes or until the garlic mixture is caramelized and glassy-jelly in appearance.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Slice the flatbread into wedges and serve warm.

axes.dishForm: Pa amb tomàquet variant: griddled flatbread
